description: Configuration for the gel-image feature extraction and quantitative prediction workflow.

primary_output_features.IOD_gray_hyst: Integrated gray-channel signal after local hysteresis mask refinement.
primary_output_features.log_IOD_gray_hyst: Natural logarithm of one plus IOD_gray_hyst.
primary_output_features.log_area_gray_hyst_px: Natural logarithm of one plus the gray-channel refined mask area.

repository_contents.src: Python source code for lane segmentation, band detection, feature extraction, and optional quantitative prediction.
repository_contents.models: Trained model weights required for reproducing inference.
repository_contents.data: Empty input directories for user-supplied gel images or zip archives.
